goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'restaurant'. The restaurant should be in the 'expensive' price range and should serve 'indian' food.
The restaurant should be in the 'west'.
Once you find the 'restaurant' you want to book a table for '6 people' at '13:00' on 'tuesday'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the 'same price range as the restaurant' and should have 'a star of 3'.
The hotel should 'include free wifi' and should be in the type of 'hotel'.
Make sure you get 'whether they have free parking'.Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a restaurant. The restaurant should be in the expensive price range and should serve indian food
The restaurant should be in the west
Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for 6 people at 13:00 on tuesday
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the same price range as the restaurant and should have a star of 3
The hotel should include free wifi and should be in the type of hotel
Make sure you get whether they have free parking
